name: io.schemastore/schemastore-mcp-server
description: MCP server for SchemaStore.org — search, browse, and retrieve JSON schemas from the SchemaStore catalog.

tools.name: searchSchemas
tools.description: Search the SchemaStore.org catalog for JSON schemas by name, description, or file pattern.

tools.name: getSchema
tools.description: Get the full JSON Schema document for a specific schema by name.

tools.name: listSchemas
tools.description: List all available JSON schemas from SchemaStore.org with pagination.
